dimensions.finding-vocab: CLEAN — severity(critical|major|minor|low)/type/stakes_class/disposition/timing_tier consistent across all encoding files; the 12-file severity sweep held; no stray high/medium/blocker severity.
dimensions.verification-method-vocab: DRIFT_FOUND->FIXED — app-ui method 'smoke-ui' (producer) vs 'smoke' (routing doc/harness/contract-guide/consumable-gate) would reject every app-ui story; collapsed to 'smoke' (Option B, matches authoritative doc + all runtime consumers).
dimensions.conductor-coherence: DRIFT_FOUND->FIXED — Phase-5 mid-flight read per-story transient not the Conductor accumulator (under-report); end_gate_escalations name-collision hazard; stale L1078 ref; coverage_discharge_results orphaned. All reconciled.
dimensions.integration-seams: DRIFT_FOUND->FIXED — RC fixer flat payload (dev->green-field, the avfl-merge bug un-propagated to the RC site); AVFL leftovers hard-stamped routine (merge stakes findings silently demoted, no decision card); suggestion vs suggested_fix drift; renderer input-contract gap. All reconciled.

high_risk_resolved: RC redispatch flat payload -> green-field instead of fix-mode (wrapped in directed_fix)
AVFL-on-merge stakes findings silently demoted to routine (stakes_class now carried + escalations wired to decision cards)
Phase-5 mid-flight section under-reporting (sources the Conductor-scoped accumulator now)
leftovers: Frozen contract eval.yaml headers for app-ui still say 'smoke-ui' (FROZEN — not edited); a contract-quality follow-up to re-emit with the producer once the two-column-vs-one-column decision is ratified.

Design tension: the redesign spec (sprint-dev-redesign-spec.md:539) envisioned a two-column model (method 'smoke-ui' != driver 'smoke'); the build collapsed to one column ('smoke') because the two-column was never fully implemented (harness has no smoke-ui key) and all runtime consumers use 'smoke'. DECISION for the developer: keep the single-column 'smoke' (done) or fully implement the two-column model later.

coverage.dedicated_run: All 22 received a per-story QA verification during the build (each story: dev -> QA-vs-contract + adversarial review -> fix -> merge).

covered_by_composition.conduct-momentum-tools-path-resolution: DISCHARGED by Scenario 2 (discovery/live-engine): bare momentum-tools resolves and was used by every build operation throughout this run.
covered_by_composition.conduct-per-story-build-review-dispatch: DISCHARGED by Scenario 1 (fixture build run): the per-story build/review/commit dispatch carried all 25 stories through dev->review->fix->merge — this 25-story by-hand build IS the demonstration.
covered_by_composition.avfl-merge-review-as-workflow: DISCHARGED by Scenario 1: the merge-review ran in its real build position over the sprint-vs-main 3-dot integrated diff (the post-merge AVFL pass above).

coverage.e2e_surface: This repo is markdown/skills/bash (no executable app/backend surface) — verification-harness all-skip carve-out applies; E2E = per-story verification (skill-invoke/document-review/bash) + the integration-consistency AVFL pass. The fixture sprint (capstone) carries real runners for a product-app project, demonstrating the per-project override.
coverage.no_silent_gap: All 25 stories verified or discharged; the consumable verifier PASSes on the fixture; no story left unverified.
